## nullableBooleanConverter variable

A [ValueConverter](./fast-element.valueconverter.md) that converts to and from `boolean` values. `null`<!-- -->, `undefined`<!-- -->, `""`<!-- -->, and `void` values are converted to `null`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
nullableBooleanConverter: ValueConverter
```
